verse.name: C1
verse.lines: Hallowed be Thy name, Jehovah God You reign And You will never change, O Lord, forever You're the same.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Jehovah Jireh, You supply my every need. Jehovah Rapha, Perfect health You give to me.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Jehovah Shalom, You're the one who gives me peace. Jehovah-Rohi My faithful Shepherd leading me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Jehovah-M-Kaddesh You’re the One who makes me clean Jehovah-Tsidkenu Imparting righteousness to me

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Jehovah-Nissi Lord, You reign in victory Jehovah-Shammah You are always there for me
